# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  UserUploadsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-user-uploads"
      AccessControl: Private

  ApplicationBackupBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-application-backups"
      AccessControl: Private

  ApplicationIAMRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: S3ReadWriteAccess
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationIAMRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${UserUploadsBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${UserUploadsBucket}/*"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ApplicationBackupBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${ApplicationBackupBucket}/*"

Parameters:
  ApplicationIAMRole:
    Type: String
    Description: The ARN of the IAM role that needs access to the S3 buckets.
